title: Temperatures in Greece
tagline: Animated polar view of yearly temperatures over Greece
description: An animated exploration of yearly temperature patterns over Greece, inspired by a polar coordinates visualization and focused on highlighting seasonal extremes.
about: The animation sweeps through days of the year in polar coordinates, using radius and colour to encode temperature.

Built with Python and Matplotlib, the frames are rendered from daily temperature data, then stitched together into a smooth loop in .gif format. The design aims for a creative but nevertheless accurate feel.
